titleStmt.title: SII 34.386: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 386. Kuḷattūr, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the ruined Siva temple.

summary.p: The ūrār of Kuḷattūr reconfirmed the tax-free status of some land they had given earlier to a Tiruvaṉ Pallavarāya-pallavaraiyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOyil kulacEkaratEvaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 vatu Etirāmāṇṭu paṅkuṉi
mātattorunāḷ kuḷattūr Ūravarōm kīḻaipputu
vayal tiruvaṉ pallavarāyap pallavaraiyaṟku nāṅkaḷ mu
ṉṉāḷ Ivaṟku Iṟaiyiliyāka nilamāṟṟukkuṭuttu viṭuvi
tta kēcavaṉ vayakkal nilam muntiriyyai kīḻnālu
māvaraiyum Anantaṉ vayakkalil viṭṭa nilam kīḻ mūṉ
ṟumāvum tēvaṉ vayakkalil viṭṭa nilam kīḻ mūṉṟu māvarai
yum tēvatāṉam cuntaracōḻaṉ vayakkalil viṭṭa nilam kīḻ
Orumāvaraiyum muṉṉāḷ Eṅkaḷ puravāṉa tēvatāṉam nattiva
yakkal matiyāti vayakkalkku māṟi nilakkuṟaikku Ivar E
ṭṭi piṭāri mēṭṭil taṭi
raiyum Āka nilam Araikkāṇiyum
ṉyāṉa maṟatti vayakkaluṭaṉ
kūṭṭi catturukālaṉ vakaiyil Iṉṉilam Arai
kkāṇiyum Iṟaiyili puravil curukki cantirāt
tavaraiyum viṉiyōkamē tellām Iṟaiyiliyā
kak kaṭavatu Ākavum Itukku Aḻivucoṉṉār Uṇṭāki
l pitāputtiraṉalla vōmākavum Ippaṭikku
kulōttuṅka vēḷāḷarāṉa kuḷattūr kiḻavar Eḻuttu
kōṉār Eḻuttu ceyatuṅ
Eḻuttu cempiyaṉ pallavaraiyar Eḻuttu
vaṉ viḻupparaiyār Eḻuttu
panmākēcurapaṭṭār Eḻuttu tēcanāyakapaṭṭar
poṉmēṉi Eḻuttu
periyakōyiṟ pallavaraiyar Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku Ivvūṭaiyāṉ tattā
r tatta vēḷār kaṇakku vaḷattu
vāḻvittāṉ Eḻuttu
cuntaṉ periya nāṭṭu
vēḷār Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.386 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
